# ירון חשמל — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An emergency electrician service available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The business focuses on urgent electrical repairs and solutions, catering to customers who need immediate professional assistance at any hour. The brand revolves around reliability, speed, and availability around the clock.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
תקוע בלי חשמל? ירון חשמל מעניק שירות חשמלאי חירום 24 שעות ביממה, 7 ימים בשבוע. מענה מיידי, אמינות ללא פשרות והגעה מהירה לכל אזור. אל תישארו בחושך — חייגו עכשיו!

### תודה - ירון חשמל

## How to Contact Us

- Phone: 0533882300
- Phone (tel): tel:0533882300

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ירון חשמל
An emergency electrician service available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The business focuses on urgent electrical repairs and solutions, catering to customers who need immediate professional assistance at any hour. The brand revolves around reliability, speed, and availability around the clock.

## Target Audience
- בעלי בתים עירוניים
- סוכני נדל"ן
- בעלי עסקים קטנים

## Industry
Electrical Services

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
